subject: fix(conventions): fix Required/Optional grouping for connection fields
body:
The previous edit created two "Required:" headers in the CONNECTIONS
section, incorrectly grouping labels, content, and properties under
"Required". Only source, target, and title are required — the rest
are optional. Merged into proper Required/Optional sections.

Tags: conventions, docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: import-export
Semver: patch
